alternatives: Treat every SwiftUI local state value as product state
Allow SwiftUI Views to format domain values and own business decisions
consequences: SwiftUI retains ergonomic local interaction state without owning product policy
UIKit and SwiftUI render equivalent semantic output
Presentation-store isolation and ownership are explicit
context: SwiftUI local state and computed rendering must not blur the boundary between transient UX mechanics and display-ready product state.
decision: Deliver display-ready product state through a MainActor presentation store and limit View-local state to transient UX and geometry-only rendering mechanics.
migration: Introduce a MainActor presentation store, move product computations and formatting to the presentation mapper, and keep only UX-local state in SwiftUI Views.
title: SwiftUI rendering adapter
verification_impact: The final joined AI consistency review confirms the SwiftUI store and humble-View guidance matches the shared presentation Rules and UIKit semantics.
